title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker22: Kconfig.defconfig
close_reason: Resolved Kconfig.defconfig and related board/HAL merge conflicts in worktree-worker22 by consolidating duplicate options, standardizing on LICHEN_HAS_* pattern, adding battery/input/LV_Z defaults, cleaning retirement comments for xiao board, and updating gateway configs.
